purpose: Public-safe audit of upstream and VR-side work relevant to Nikami Worlds before inventing local ESM4 viewer fixes.

localVrRemote.localBranchNote: Local openmw-vr branch contains Nikami-specific face, hands, Pip-Boy, sky, proof, and FNVXR commits; compare and port against openmw-vr-51 before assuming it is current.

upstreamMergeRequestsToReview.title: Fix terrain normal map blending for post-processing normal buffer
upstreamMergeRequestsToReview.whyItMatters: May affect terrain/normal visibility and purple or wrong shader output.

upstreamMergeRequestsToReview.title: Visual regression fixes
upstreamMergeRequestsToReview.whyItMatters: Recent visual fixes may already solve part of the bad proof frames.

upstreamMergeRequestsToReview.title: Change the texture asset origin convention to top-left (#6885)
upstreamMergeRequestsToReview.whyItMatters: Texture origin handling can directly affect ESM4 terrain/material correctness.

upstreamMergeRequestsToReview.title: Draft: Fix ESM4 object activation, better item support
upstreamMergeRequestsToReview.whyItMatters: Relevant to the eventual selector/activation/inventory-map workflow.

upstreamMergeRequestsToReview.title: Add Fallout 3 detection to ESM4 NPC records
upstreamMergeRequestsToReview.whyItMatters: Relevant to Fallout 3 NPC/actor loading and FaceGen paths.

upstreamMergeRequestsToReview.title: ESM4 landscape texturing
upstreamMergeRequestsToReview.whyItMatters: Core terrain texture work for later Bethesda worlds.

upstreamMergeRequestsToReview.title: Object paging in ESM4 worldspaces
upstreamMergeRequestsToReview.whyItMatters: Core world visibility and distant reference loading.

upstreamMergeRequestsToReview.title: [Draft] Enable terrain textures in ESM4 cells
upstreamMergeRequestsToReview.whyItMatters: Earlier terrain texture prototype with notes from cc9cii; useful for understanding remaining gaps.

upstreamMergeRequestsToReview.title: Parse all official Oblivion, Fallout 3 and New Vegas KF files
upstreamMergeRequestsToReview.whyItMatters: Animation parsing baseline for Oblivion/Fallout 3/New Vegas.

upstreamMergeRequestsToReview.title: Draft: Read ESM4 terminal items, and expose them to lua
upstreamMergeRequestsToReview.whyItMatters: Relevant for Fallout terminal/Pip-Boy data surfaces later.

upstreamMergeRequestsToReview.title: Draft: Load ESM4 Notes, and add lua bindings for them
upstreamMergeRequestsToReview.whyItMatters: Relevant for Fallout note/text records and UI surfaces.

archiveWork.title: Support Starfield BA2s
archiveWork.whyItMatters: Confirms upstream can parse Starfield archive format pieces; this is not the same as loading Starfield records or rendering Starfield worlds.

archiveWork.title: BA2 support fixes
archiveWork.whyItMatters: Later BA2 fixes may matter for Fallout 4/Fallout 76/Starfield archive reads.

archiveWork.title: BA2 file format reading/writing
archiveWork.whyItMatters: Fallout 4 and Starfield archive handling; Starfield remains research-only until records/assets are proven.

communitySignals.title: Recent Reddit discussion showing Fallout: New Vegas in OpenMW/VR progress
communitySignals.note: Public chatter confirms people are discussing FNV-in-OpenMW/VR, but this is not a public reusable branch by itself.

communitySignals.title: Recent Reddit discussion of more Fallout: New Vegas OpenMW progress
communitySignals.note: Useful signal to keep watching community work; no complete all-world viewer implementation found from it.

workingRules: Do not assume current local OpenMW is latest; compare with official OpenMW 0.51.0 and madsbuvi openmw-vr-51.
Prefer porting relevant upstream ESM4 work before creating local equivalents.
Keep Starfield out of the supported-world promise until an OpenMW-compatible record/archive/rendering path is proven.
Any world proof must include screenshot quality metrics plus OpenMW telemetry, not just an image path.
